title: 10 best herbal teas for open pores
description: Hypericum perforatum, also known as St John's Wort, teas helps with open pores because of its astringent and antiseptic properties. The tea's high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin helps to reduce inflammation and close the pores, resulting in a smoother skin texture.
